channel.title: Tutorial on My Awesome Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on My Awesome Blog

item.title: Markdown and Mermaid Examples
item.description:
Markdown and Mermaid Examples

This post demonstrates various GitHub-style markdown features and Mermaid diagrams in Hugo.

GitHub-style Markdown Features

Tables

Feature Support
Tables ✅
Task Lists ✅
Emojis ✅
Code Blocks ✅

Task Lists

  • Enable GitHub-style markdown
  • Enable Mermaid diagrams
  • Add more examples

Code Blocks with Syntax Highlighting

def hello_world():
 print("Hello, World!")
 return True

Mermaid Diagrams

Flowchart

graph TD
A[Start] --> B{Is it working?}
B -->|Yes| C[Great!]
B -->|No| D[Debug]
D --> B

Sequence Diagram

sequenceDiagram
participant User
participant Blog
participant Server
User->>Blog: Visit page
Blog->>Server: Request content
Server-->>Blog: Return content
Blog-->>User: Display page

Gantt Chart

gantt
title Blog Development Timeline
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section Planning
Design :a1, 2024-03-19, 7d
section Development
Implementation :a2, after a1, 5d
Testing :a3, after a2, 3d

Pie Chart

pie title Blog Content Distribution
"Technical Posts" : 40
"Tutorials" : 30
"Personal Updates" : 20
"Other" : 10

Additional Markdown Features

Blockquotes

This is a blockquote. It can span multiple lines.
